docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF YEE, GREGORY SETO, ALAN AS TO DEFENDANT MAI, GUO WEI DOES 1 TO 25 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAY-19-1997 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-18-1997 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       APR-29-1997
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED.
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAY-19-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE OSC ON PLTF'S ATTY DONAL KRENTSA FOR POS ON DEFT. HEARING SET FOR JUN-25-1997 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT X1 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF YEE, GREGORY SETO, ALAN HEARING SET FOR JUL-07-1997 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 02

OSC CALENDAR OF JUN-25-1997, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $100.00 FOR FAILURE TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TO FILE POS. PLTF'S ATTY TO FILE MOTION TO WITHDRAW AND NOTIFY PLTF OF OSC DATE. OSC AND SANCTION AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY DONALD KRENTSA., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUL-10-1997 CONTINUED FROM JUN-25-1997 TO AUG-20-1997 AT 02:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF YEE, GREGORY
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS, COMPLAINT,CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET,ETC FILED BY PLAINTIFF YEE, GREGORY SERVED JUN-30-1997, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MAI, GUO WEI

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 02, MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD, CALENDAR OF JUL-07-1997, GRANTED PURSUANT TO WRITTEN ORDER PLAINTIFF TO PREPARE ORDER INCLUDING FUTURE STATUS/TRIAL DELAY PROGRAM DATES & SANCTIONS & LEGAL CONSEQUENCES ADMONITION.
ORDER GRANTING MOTION FOR PERMISSION TO WITHDRAW AS COUNSEL OF RECORD FILED
WITHDRAWL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD: KRENTSA, DONALD EDWARD WITHDRAWN, REPLACED BY PRO PER AS ATTORNEY FOR YEE, GREGORY
WITHDRAWL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD: Y KRENTSA, DONALD EDWARD WITHDRAWN, REPLACED BY PRO PER AS ATTORNEY FOR SETO, ALAN

OSC CALENDAR OF AUG-20-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEAULT AGAINST DEFENDANT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE DIRECTED TO PLT. IN PRO PER HEARING SET FOR SEP-24-1997 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT X1 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF SEP-24-1997, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON SEP-24-1997, TO FILE ANSWER OR ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFT. OSC AND SANCTIONS AGAINST PLTF GREGORY YEE AND ALAN SETO $200 EACH. PLTFS TO FILE NEW STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE OCT-09-1997 CONTINUED FROM SEP-24-1997 TO DEC-03-1997 AT 02:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
OSC CALENDAR OF DEC-03-1997, DISMISSAL CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH COURT'S ORDER.
